## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `gitleaks detect --redact --no-banner --verbose`

## Docs And Safety

- [ ] English and Turkish onboarding stay aligned when first-run guidance changes.
- [ ] Version-sensitive Codex claims are backed by current official docs or `docs/RESEARCH_NOTES.md`.
- [ ] No local hook config, generated hook logs, secrets, auth files, screenshots, archives, or local machine paths are committed.
- [ ] Shared config examples avoid broad default permissions.
